name: Region Group
analysis: RGN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.3800. Trade idea: entry A$2.4150, stop A$2.1879, target A$3.0963 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
